description: A hot sandwich made by cooking bread with cheese until the bread is crisp and the cheese melts. It is simple, rich, and commonly served with soup.
preparation_steps: Assemble cheese between slices of bread.
Butter the outside of the bread or oil the pan.
Cook on a skillet or griddle over moderate heat until the bread is golden and the cheese melts.

health_advice.benefits: Provides protein and calcium from cheese and can be filling.
health_advice.risks: Can be high in saturated fat and sodium, especially with large amounts of cheese and butter.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Use moderate cheese, whole-grain bread, and pair it with soup or salad rather than making it oversized.

dietary_notes.note: Usually vegetarian. Vegan versions need plant-based cheese and butter. Gluten-free versions require gluten-free bread.
